title: Figure 8 in Galactomannan inhibits Trichinella spiralis invasion of intestinal epithelium cells and enhances antibody-dependent cellular cytotoxicity related killing of larvae by driving macrophage polarization
author: Zhang, Ru
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 8. mRNA expression level of M1/M2 cytokines in murine peritoneal macrophages. The mRNA expression of M1 cytokines (IL-1β, IL-6, and TNF-α) and M2 cytokines (IL-10, TGF-β) and marker CD206 in mouse peritoneal macrophages was measured by qPCR. The relative mRNA expression was calculated with the Ct (2—ΔΔCt) method. GAPDH was utilized as an internal control. *p <0.0001 compared to the DMEM group.
steps_raw: Figure 8. mRNA expression level of M1/M2 cytokines in murine peritoneal macrophages. The mRNA expression of M1 cytokines (IL-1β, IL-6, and TNF-α) and M2 cytokines (IL-10, TGF-β) and marker CD206 in mouse peritoneal macrophages was measured by qPCR. The relative mRNA expression was calculated with the Ct (2—ΔΔCt) method. GAPDH was utilized as an internal control. *p <0.0001 compared to the DMEM group.
